content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1559: Dogfight Translator: Sigma_ Editor: Hitesh_

Fan De Lei was gory, his handsome face like a broken watermelon dripping dirty juice.

The starlight dots twirled around his body like fireflies, creating a light curtain. Numerous bands of starlight emitted from the broken palaces. At this moment, they were torn into powder, moving along with the twisting winds as the power of wind howled furiously.

Cantecie’s cage was broken and Mei Ji was revealed, looking unharmed.

Fan De Lei shot Cantecie a look; he was furious, but he didn’t show it. Anyway, he didn’t mind his disheveled condition. As he touched his labella, hundreds of star nuclei flew out. They were all crystal clear, which were refined perfectly from the essence of the life star. Each of the star nuclei were quenched thousands of times, giving them an intimidating power.

Hundreds of star nuclei arrayed like a miniature universe. They shrank and covered Fan De Lei’s body directly, turning into a set of dazzling star armor.

At first glance, Fan De Lei seemed to have a crystal twirling around his body. The immense star energy gathered, creating a new barrier to confine Mei Ji.

After one furious strike from Shi Yan, Mei Ji’s confinement was loosened a little bit, but got tightened one more time now.

Shi Yan had transformed into his Absolute Beginning body, becoming a towering giant. He stood on the land of the Phantom Clan like a mountain piercing through the sky. Many Phantom Clan fellows were screaming, running away as fast as they could.

“You should die...all of you!”

The void was filled with Shi Yan’s bestial howling as the inheritance towers crazily barged and bumped into Cantecie’s horrible tornadoes.

Sizzle! Sizzle! Sizzle!

Lightning strikes meandered like giant dragons. With a closer look, one could realize that those lightning strikes were actually space slits that could tear everything!

Massive lightning bolts weaved with each other and the entire sky was torn into pieces. It was like an exploding frozen lake, revealing so many terrifying cracks.

An endless desolate aura came from the space slits that led to unknown locations. It seemed that those areas didn’t have a single beam of energy or any creature visiting there in billions of years. As long as a warrior got in there accidentally, they would have to endure the infinite loneliness. Their hope would be consumed soon, and when their energy was consumed up one day, they would destroy themselves.

When the warriors of the Phantom Clan saw the space shattering, they were all petrified.

As those lightning strikes moved around, the beautiful palaces turned into powder, disappearing into the slits. The fairyland territory of the Phantom Clan was now a ruin, and it would transform into a horrible hell soon.

Fan De Lei and Cantecie were frightened. They didn’t think that Shi Yan could be so fierce and evil. When he turned into the Absolute Beginning body, he had also become the most brutal demon who didn’t care about any lives.

At this moment, they suddenly recognized what catastrophe Shi Yan had brought to the Devouring Clan, the Soul Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, and Black Demon Clan!

They finally understood why the Serene Prison and the others had sworn to kill him at any cost.

“Don’t! My fellows are innocent!”

While Shi Yan was crazily showing his power in an attempt to slaughter, Mei Ji didn’t mind the silver star chains coiling her as she screamed at Shi Yan in the void.

Many members of the Phantom Clan were persuaded to work with Cantecie and Fan De Lei, convinced to support the two. However, most members of this group didn’t want to join the war between the seven clans. As Cantecie and Fan De Lei had deluded and deceived them, they gradually accepted the plan.

However, at this moment, seeing Mei Ji in confinement to protect them, the soft spot in their hearts was touched.

“Mei Ji is a member of our clan! No matter what, unchain her first!”

“Fan De Lei! Release her!”

“We won’t allow a civil war! Never!”

...

For the time being, the Phantom Clan fellows screamed and yelled to protect Mei Ji.

They were screaming while walking out of every corner to call for the members of the Phantom Clan. A large group of warriors had ignored Fan De Lei’s guards to storm toward him, trying to help Mei Ji get rid of the confinement.

The sudden incident made Cantecie pale and Fan De Lei get startled. They recognized that they hadn’t conquered the people’s minds yet. In the Phantom Clan, they didn’t have the supreme power, and they would never be able to convince their fellows.

“Madam Mei Ji! I’m coming to save you!”

A young man of the Phantom Clan at the Incipient God Realm had stormed forward without fearing of Fan De Lei’s defending halos.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

Hundreds of light beams shot toward the young man and pierced him into a beehive, his body exploding on the spot.

“Don’t come close! We will kill anyone!” said a loyal subordinate of Fan De Lei as he ordered several hundred warriors to scream while protecting Fan De Lei well.

“Duke! You killed a fella! You will be punished by the clan’s rules!”

“Kill him!”

“Make him pay for his sin!”

“Damn you Duke! You killed my brother! I’m going to kill you!”

The members of the Phantom Clan cried and moved toward Duke. As they urged their energies, the sky above their heads was filled with so many bright Incipient extents. Some looked dark like the evil abyss; some were like the ranges of volcanos, and even the endless desert...depending on their power Upanishads.

Crack! Crack!

A space lightning shot toward the barriers Fan De Lei’s subordinates had cast. With that, many layers were cut through while energy sparked everywhere.

Their defense was broken!

“Fan De Lei! Watch Mei Ji!”

When Cantecie saw the strange situation, she decided fast, screaming and disappearing instantly. A massive, fearful tornado appeared at her spot; it was tens of thousands of meters tall, as if it could connect earth and heaven while twirling massively and frighteningly.

Inside the tornado, Cantecie’s voice arose, “Shi Yan, do you think that you can swagger in our Phantom Clan’s territory? I’m going to show you the real power of the Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm!”

The tornado that connected the ground and the sky roared brutally, twisting toward Shi Yan’s Absolute Beginning body.

Instantly, a sandstorm arose amidst the thunderbolts and twisted space while beams of light shot over from outer space. This doomsday scene shook everybody, and the low-realm warriors shivered in despair. They didn’t know what to do in this apocalypse.

“Boop! Boop! Boop!”

All of a sudden, a blood energy column shot out of each of Shi Yan’s acupuncture points.

Those blood columns were made of negative energy, filled with furious, destructive energy. There were seven hundred and twenty blood columns from seven hundred and twenty acupuncture points in Shi Yan’s body. Shortly, they turned into seven hundred and twenty massive blood dragon, each of whom was more than ten thousand meters long, stinking with a murderous aura.

Seven hundred and twenty dragons hissed and roared, barging into the tornado.

BOOM! BOOM! BOOM!

The blood dragons twisted and attacked the tornado frantically, striking Cantecie inside!

Actually, the void couldn’t endure this pressure. This furious battle would destroy earth and heaven here. Unexpectedly, so many light dots in the sea of stars were occupied discreetly.

Deep in the void, Shi Yan’s eyes were like two gory planets as maniacal emotions continued to rise in his pupils.

Zhen Ru had disturbed him while he was at the most critical moment to refine the energy. He had to endure the backlash to fight forcefully against Zhen Ru and Cantecie. Moreover, Cantecie had provoked him badly, which had finally pushed him into bedevilment.

At this moment, he was fighting against Cantecie while trying to control the turbulent energy in his body and soul altar. He needed to keep a sound mind.

The soul altar and the acupuncture points had many negative emotions in them, which were growing fast. They were like the dregs that wanted to seize the chance to wreak havoc in his soul and body.

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower shot a magical light column that shone upon his territory and Sea of Consciousness, eliminating Zhen Ru’s two kinds of evil creatures.

But, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower didn’t retrieve the light yet, still shining brightly! In his territory, a new species was generated as the strong light shone about. They were created with his soul seal and blood as the foundation, and the worms as the bodies.

His territory now finally had creatures, a sign of another advancement in his realm! However, at this moment, the new residents of his territory were affected by the negative emotions and soul energy, turning evil and destructive!

It was a sign of his unstable realm!

He had to spend more efforts to control those creatures, which were about to evolve in an uncontrollable path. He wanted them to evolve in his way.

Deep in the void. Shi Yan shivered and he turned to check his abdomen.

At this moment, he was standing in this world in his Absolute Beginning body, his size now even bigger than a majestic mountain on this planet. However, a small light dot was stabbing into his lower abdomen like a sharp needle!

It was Zhen Ru!

He didn’t expect that Zhen Ru would attack him at this moment. She had aimed at his lower abdomen where his God power Ancient Tree was situated. She wanted to destroy his source of energy!

“Good!”

Shi Yan suddenly grinned and his massive body shrank all of a sudden. While shrinking, a black hole flew out of his mouth that turned into a small dot before flashing and disappearing.

A black dot quietly flashed like a black pawn right at his lower abdomen, shortly swallowing the little light dot.

Swoosh! Swoosh!

The fierce swallowing power arose from that black dot like the mouth of a demon with unlimited greed, seemingly wanting to swallow the entire world.

Zhen Ru discolored. “You do know the Devouring Power Upanishad! But if you want to swallow, I will let you eat your full!”

Several thousand secret treasures exploded, turning into thunder mines and lightning balls that exploded continually while aiming at Shi Yan’s devouring black hole. “Edgar taught me this!”

Rumble! Rumble! Rumble!

Constant explosions arose from the black hole, which eventually shattered. Shi Yan felt a twinge in his soul, his face aghast.
